lap-swim.label: Lap Swim
lap-swim.description: Swim laps and practice your strokes during designated lap-swim hours.

independent-exercise.label: Independent Exercise (Dive Tank)
independent-exercise.description: Self-directed water exercise — water jogging or walking in the dive tank or shallow pool.

family-swim.label: Family Swim (Shallow)
family-swim.description: Bring little ones of any age to splash around in the shallow pool.

community-swim.label: Community Swim
community-swim.description: All ages welcome to play in the entire pool during open community hours.

aquatic-masters.label: Berkeley Aquatic Masters
aquatic-masters.description: Coached workouts for swimmers of all abilities. Requires a premium pass.

senior-exercise.label: Senior Exercise
senior-exercise.description: Fun aerobic water exercises with other seniors. Requires a premium pass.

barracudas.label: Berkeley Barracudas
barracudas.description: Afterschool swim team across four levels. A tryout is required before registration.

swim-lessons.label: Swim Lessons
swim-lessons.description: Gain comfort in the water and learn the fundamentals of swimming, with classes for every level.

aqua-zumba.label: Aqua Zumba
aqua-zumba.description: Water-based Zumba fitness class. Pre-registration required.

shower-program.label: Shower Program
shower-program.description: Drop-in warm-shower access for community members.

learn-to-swim.title: Introduction to Water Skills
learn-to-swim.description: Gain confidence in the pool environment — floating and kicking with support, blowing bubbles, and water-safety skills.

learn-to-swim.title: Fundamental Aquatic Skills
learn-to-swim.description: Learn independent locomotion on front and back, building a foundation for swimming strokes.
learn-to-swim.prereq: Comfortable kicking, floating, and blowing bubbles without instructor support.

learn-to-swim.title: Stroke Development
learn-to-swim.description: Learn side-breathing for the front crawl, develop further stroke skills, and get introduced to deep water.
learn-to-swim.prereq: Independent locomotion; can swim 10 yards on front and back.

learn-to-swim.title: Stroke Improvement
learn-to-swim.description: Improve proficiency and endurance over greater distances. Introduces back crawl, butterfly, and a simple open turn at the wall.

learn-to-swim.title: Stroke Refinement
learn-to-swim.description: Refine all six strokes over greater distances and learn flip turns on front and back.
learn-to-swim.prereq: Can swim 25 yds front crawl with breathing and 25 yds back crawl.

preschool.title: Introduction to Water Skills
preschool.description: Floating and kicking with support, blowing bubbles, and learning water-safety skills.

preschool.title: Elementary Water Skills
preschool.description: Floating, kicking, and bobbing with support, plus water-safety skills.
preschool.prereq: Comfort in the water; can kick, float, and blow bubbles with instructor support.

preschool.title: Basic Water Skills
preschool.description: Locomotion and treading water independently while learning water-safety skills.
preschool.prereq: Comfortable kicking, floating, and bubble-blowing without instructor support.
